scripts.test: node tests/static-regression.mjs && node tests/interchange-regression.mjs && node tests/omnicore-regression.mjs && node tests/r3a-lifeos-regression.mjs && node tests/r3b-strength-regression.mjs && node tests/pwa-assurance-regression.mjs && node tests/pwa-worker-regression.mjs && node tests/r0-worker-regression.mjs && node tests/noodle-scoring-regression.mjs && node tests/healthos-regression.mjs
